score_components.formula_applied: Cannot score - this is an instructional video, not a timed FLS task performance

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an instructional video demonstrating knot tying technique rather than a timed FLS task performance. No Penrose drain, marks, or FLS trainer setup visible. Cannot assess task completion or score.
cannot_determine: Task completion time - this is a demonstration video
Suture placement accuracy - no target marks visible
Drain status - no Penrose drain present in demonstration
FLS score - not an actual task performance
technique_summary: This appears to be an educational demonstration of extracorporeal knot tying technique (Roaders knot) rather than an actual FLS Task 4 performance. The video shows proper knot formation technique but lacks the required FLS trainer setup, Penrose drain with marks, and timing elements.
strengths: Clear demonstration of knot formation technique
Smooth suture handling and loop management
improvement_suggestions: For actual FLS scoring, need video of complete task performance with drain and marks visible
Should include timing from first instrument appearance to task completion
